name: Resonance Sensor
description: 22-sensor parallel-field compositor where all sensors report simultaneously and independently under arbitration rules. Reads ambient electromagnetic field activity across spatial domains, constructing a bidirectional resonance graph queryable for neighbors and subgraphs. Sound, light, gravity, thermal, chemical, and consciousness channels converge into a unified field adapter.

core_attributes.pattern: parallel-field composition, 22-channel arbitration, bidirectional resonance graph
